creator: matt@chronos.org.uk
text:
net-im/jabber no longer builds with new security/gnutls port. Full build log here:

http://tinderbox.chronos.org.uk/tb/errors/7-amd64-Server/jabber-1.6.1.1_5,1.log

Also, security/libtasn1 is out of date, current version is 2.3 (I have tried manually updating security/libtasn1 to 2.3 but the error persists).

How-To-Repeat: Try to build net-im/jabber with a current ports tree
